title: silene ciliata subsp. geniculata
intro: Silene ciliata subsp. geniculata, also known as the fringe campion, is a perennial plant species in the carnation family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Silene ciliata subsp. geniculata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties, making it a valuable herb for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
